source.reference: MATLAB for Engineering Applications, William J. Palm, Chapter 6, Q7

measurement_model.noise_model: Gaussian voltage residuals estimated from the fitted trace; no independent instrument noise is declared

admission_checks: time and voltage arrays are finite
all voltage values are positive so log-linear comparison is defined
V0 is declared by the problem statement
late nonmonotone point is recorded as a warning rather than silently removed
mandatory_refusals: capacitance inference without separately declared resistance
